response.justification: Candidate is a versatile senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), but the resume does not demonstrate the director-level IC profile, recognized AI expertise, or shipped AI products/platforms required for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, defining cloud product futures, or leading disruptive AI initiatives at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial and architectural ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale or recognized AI expertise expected for a Principal role
Lacks director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product strategy
Limited deep cloud-platform experience (AWS CDK only); no Master's/PhD in AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise/shipped AI products
Insufficient director-level IC and strategic advisory scope
